# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.3-codex-spark-xhigh

## Summary

No source-code regressions were found in the requested lifecycle areas. The working-tree diff only updates `.ralph-burning/projects/rlm/journal.ndjson` and `.ralph-burning/projects/rlm/run.json`, so there are no new runtime changes to review in this cycle (PID liveness, `run stop`, stale `run status`, automatic resume recovery, PID cleanup/signals are already present in current implementation files).

## Amendments

None.
